# TMET Skills Catalog

This repository keeps a minimal skill set for TMET workflows. Only the skills below are supported.

## Approved Skills

- `api-development`: implement or update Express routes/models/helpers for TMET APIs.
- `api-unit-testing-jest`: write and maintain Jest + Supertest unit/route tests under `__tests__/`.
- `api-functional-testing`: validate API behavior and async job flows end-to-end using real route contracts.
- `docker-deployment`: run and debug TMET with Docker Compose (`node` + `chrome`).
- `web-frontend`: update static UI modules in `public/` that orchestrate pipeline/matching/students flows.
- `debugging-operations`: investigate runtime/test failures, logs, and queue/scraper/upload operational issues.
- `skill-creator`: generic guide for creating or evolving skills.
